raw_consumer_statement:
Someone walked into the XXXX XXXX store On XXXX on XXXX, XXXX  ( 2 hrs from me ) and opened a credit card under my name and charged {$590.00}. 
When I received the credit card in the mail I called Barclays customer service to report this fraud XX/XX/2025. They said they would turn it over to their fraud dept to do an investigation. They came back to me and said the account was valid because I benefitted from use of this card. The amount due is now {$1200.00} and I am liable for it. I did not request this card or charge the mdse on it. The fraud status has been removed and they will not write it off.
